Saltar al contenido principal

Parcial 01: Métricas de ordenamiento

Punto 4: Ordenamiento con valores repetidos

Evaluar Burbuja Simple, Burbuja Mejorado, Quick Sort, Shell Sort, Seleccion Directa e Insercion en arreglos con alta repeticion para identificar el metodo mas adecuado.

Código del punto

/*
PARCIAL 1 - PUNTO 4

Ordenamiento de valores repetidos:
Comparar Burbuja Simple, Burbuja Mejorado, Quick Sort, Shell Sort,
Seleccion Directa e Insercion en dos arreglos con repeticiones.
*/

import java.text.Normalizer;
import java.util.Arrays;

public class Parcial01Punto04 {

    static class Resultado {
        String algoritmo;
        long comparaciones;
        long tiempoNs;
        long memoriaBytes;

        Resultado(String algoritmo, long comparaciones, long tiempoNs, long memoriaBytes) {
            this.algoritmo = algoritmo;
            this.comparaciones = comparaciones;
            this.tiempoNs = tiempoNs;
            this.memoriaBytes = memoriaBytes;
        }
    }

    static String normalizar(String s) {
        return Normalizer.normalize(s, Normalizer.Form.NFD)
                .replaceAll("\\p{M}+", "")
                .toLowerCase();
    }

    static int compararTexto(String a, String b) {
        return normalizar(a).compareTo(normalizar(b));
    }

    interface OrdenadorTexto { long ordenar(String[] arr); }
    interface OrdenadorNumero { long ordenar(int[] arr); }

    static long memoriaUsada() {
        Runtime runtime = Runtime.getRuntime();
        return runtime.totalMemory() - runtime.freeMemory();
    }

    // Situacion 1 (exacta)
    static String[] nombres_repetidos_grande = { "Sofía", "Martina", "Lucía", "Natalia", "Andrea",
"Laura", "Carlos", "Ana", "Jesús", "Alejandro", "Valentina", "Pedro", "Isabel", "Gabriel",
"María", "Sara", "Gonzalo", "Marta", "Ricardo", "José", "Lucía", "Adrián", "Samuel",
"Diego", "Cristina", "Alberto", "Sara", "Pablo", "Laura", "Cristina", "Claudia", "Marta",
"Fernando", "Alba", "Victoria", "Laura", "Guillermo", "Sara", "Antonio", "Rubén", "María",
"Javier", "Beatriz", "Laura", "Francisco", "Ricardo", "Andrés", "Víctor", "Ricardo", "Jorge",
"Javier", "Patricia", "Natalia", "Carmen", "Alejandro", "Beatriz", "Laura", "Laura", "Laura",
"Pablo", "Martina", "Ricardo", "Ricardo", "Javier", "Sara", "Diego", "Laura", "Adrián",
"Lucía", "María", "Laura", "Laura", "Alberto", "Laura", "Sara", "Francisco", "Andrea",
"Pablo", "Lucía", "Andrea", "Lucía", "Laura", "Carmen", "Sergio", "José", "Carlos", "María",
"Laura", "Javier", "Laura", "Ricardo", "Andrea", "María", "Alberto", "Laura", "Fernando",
"Sofía", "Martina", "Lucía", "Natalia", "Andrea", "Laura", "Carlos", "Ana", "Jesús",
"Alejandro", "Valentina", "Pedro", "Isabel", "Gabriel", "María", "Sara", "Gonzalo", "Marta",
"Ricardo", "José", "Lucía", "Adrián", "Samuel", "Diego", "Cristina", "Alberto", "Sara",
"Pablo", "Laura", "Cristina", "Claudia", "Marta", "Fernando", "Alba", "Victoria", "Laura",
"Guillermo", "Sara", "Antonio", "Rubén", "María", "Javier", "Beatriz", "Laura", "Francisco",
"Ricardo", "Andrés", "Víctor", "Ricardo", "Jorge", "Javier", "Patricia", "Natalia", "Carmen",
"Alejandro", "Beatriz", "Laura", "Laura", "Laura", "Pablo", "Martina", "Ricardo", "Ricardo",
"Javier", "Sara", "Diego", "Laura", "Adrián", "Lucía", "María", "Laura", "Laura", "Alberto",
"Laura", "Sara", "Francisco", "Andrea", "Pablo", "Lucía", "Andrea", "Lucía", "Laura",
"Carmen", "Sergio", "José", "Carlos", "María", "Laura", "Javier", "Laura", "Ricardo",
"Andrea", "María", "Alberto", "Laura", "Fernando" };

    // Situacion 2 (exacta)
    static int[] numeros_repetidos_grande = { 3482, 9107, 4425, 1893, 7261, 5504, 2319, 8847, 6012,
4390, 7712, 1056, 9238, 3341, 5609, 2174, 8045, 6673, 4920, 1155, 7839, 2902, 5418, 9367, 4081,
6254, 8190, 3726, 1544, 9901, 4872, 7033, 2266, 5198, 8340, 6127, 4404, 1925, 7750, 3051, 8614,
5592, 1289, 9430, 4716, 6885, 2349, 8102, 3957, 5023, 7468, 1184, 9036, 4277, 6511, 2890, 8433,
5729, 3110, 9655, 4321, 7094, 1867, 5532, 8240, 6903, 3378, 1022, 9745, 4156, 7280, 2591, 8813,
5466, 3804, 9129, 4670, 6044, 2133, 7952, 1409, 5821, 8366, 3294, 9510, 4837, 7125, 2068, 6741,
8922, 5355, 3689, 1247, 9803, 4594, 7311, 2750, 8019, 5634, 3942, 9276, 4485, 6160, 1937, 7808,
2211, 5090, 8527, 3403, 9388, 4122, 7555, 2640, 8734, 5209, 3567, 1376, 9942, 4601, 6499, 2822,
8150, 3187, 5974, 7623, 1104, 9059, 4233, 6311, 2467, 8688, 5576, 3010, 9466, 4741, 7203, 1855, 5320, 8401, 6929, 3255, 1088, 9712, 4039, 7420, 2533, 8911, 5684, 3766, 9190, 4501,
6277, 2004,7865, 1472, 5933, 8290, 3311, 9588, 4950, 7100, 2189, 6854, 8831, 5492, 3621, 1210, 9877, 4625,
7380, 2712, 8076, 5145, 3878, 9343, 4422, 6089, 1901, 7725, 2240, 5011, 8594, 3476, 9411, 4199,
7512, 2690, 8788, 5266, 3501, 1344, 9920, 4654, 6427, 2855, 8100, 3133, 5890, 7688, 1143, 9022,
4289, 6366, 2401, 8632, 5511, 3074, 9499, 4776, 7250, 1812, 5394, 8467, 6981, 3222, 1050, 9777,
4011, 7480, 2576, 8966, 5612, 3711, 9155, 4567, 6212, 2088, 7922, 1433, 5901, 8254, 3329, 9555,
4912, 7177, 2150, 6811, 8876, 5427, 3601, 1255, 9840, 3482, 9107, 4425, 1893, 7261, 5504, 2319,
8847, 6012, 4390, 7712, 1056, 9238, 3341, 5609, 2174, 8045, 6673, 4920, 1155, 7839, 2902, 5418,
9367, 4081, 6254, 8190, 3726, 1544, 9901, 4872, 7033, 2266, 5198, 8340, 6127, 4404, 1925, 7750,
3051, 8614, 5592, 1289, 9430, 4716, 6885, 2349, 8102, 3957, 5023, 7468, 1184, 9036, 4277, 6511,
2890, 8433, 5729, 3110, 9655, 4321, 7094, 1867, 5532, 8240, 6903, 3378, 1022, 9745, 4156, 7280,
2591, 8813, 5466, 3804, 9129, 4670, 6044, 2133, 7952, 1409, 5821, 8366, 3294, 9510, 4837, 7125,
2068, 6741, 8922, 5355, 3689, 1247, 9803, 4594, 7311, 2750, 8019, 5634, 3942, 9276, 4485, 6160,
1937, 7808, 2211, 5090, 8527, 3403, 9388, 4122, 7555, 2640, 8734, 5209, 3567, 1376, 9942, 4601,
6499, 2822, 8150, 3187, 5974, 7623, 1104, 9059, 4233, 6311, 2467, 8688, 5576, 3010, 9466, 4741,
7203, 1855, 5320, 8401, 6929, 3255, 1088, 9712, 4039, 7420, 2533, 8911, 5684, 3766, 9190, 4501,
6277, 2004, 7865, 1472, 5933, 8290, 3311, 9588, 4950, 7100, 2189, 6854, 8831, 5492, 3621, 1210,
9877, 4625, 7380, 2712, 8076, 5145, 3878, 9343, 4422, 6089, 1901, 7725, 2240, 5011, 8594, 3476,
9411, 4199, 7512, 2690, 8788, 5266, 3501, 1344, 9920, 4654, 6427, 2855, 8100, 3133, 5890, 7688,
1143, 9022, 4289, 6366, 2401, 8632, 5511, 3074, 9499, 4776, 7250, 1812, 5394, 8467, 6981, 3222,
1050, 9777, 4011, 7480, 2576, 8966, 5612, 3711, 9155, 4567, 6212, 2088, 7922, 1433, 5901, 8254,
3329, 9555, 4912, 7177, 2150, 6811, 8876, 5427, 3601, 1255, 9840 };

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        System.out.println("=== RESULTADOS PUNTO 4 - SITUACION 1 (nombres_repetidos_grande) ===");
        Resultado[] r1 = new Resultado[] {
                medirTexto("Burbuja Simple", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::burbujaSimpleTexto),
                medirTexto("Burbuja Mejorado", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::burbujaMejoradoTexto),
                medirTexto("Quick Sort", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::quickSortTexto),
                medirTexto("Shell Sort", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::shellSortTexto),
                medirTexto("Seleccion Directa", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::seleccionDirectaTexto),
                medirTexto("Insercion", nombres_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::insercionTexto)
        };
        imprimirResultados(r1);

        System.out.println();
        System.out.println("=== RESULTADOS PUNTO 4 - SITUACION 2 (numeros_repetidos_grande) ===");
        Resultado[] r2 = new Resultado[] {
                medirNumero("Burbuja Simple", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::burbujaSimpleNum),
                medirNumero("Burbuja Mejorado", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::burbujaMejoradoNum),
                medirNumero("Quick Sort", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::quickSortNum),
                medirNumero("Shell Sort", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::shellSortNum),
                medirNumero("Seleccion Directa", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::seleccionDirectaNum),
                medirNumero("Insercion", numeros_repetidos_grande, Parcial01Punto04::insercionNum)
        };
        imprimirResultados(r2);
    }

    static void imprimirResultados(Resultado[] resultados) {
        Resultado mejor = resultados[0];
        for (Resultado r : resultados) {
            System.out.printf("%-18s | Comparaciones: %-9d | Tiempo: %-10d ns | Memoria: %d bytes%n",
                    r.algoritmo, r.comparaciones, r.tiempoNs, r.memoriaBytes);
            if (r.tiempoNs < mejor.tiempoNs) mejor = r;
        }
        System.out.println("---------------------------------------------");
        System.out.println("Algoritmo mas eficiente (por tiempo): " + mejor.algoritmo);
    }

    static Resultado medirTexto(String nombre, String[] base, OrdenadorTexto metodo) {
        String[] copia = Arrays.copyOf(base, base.length);
        long memAntes = memoriaUsada();
        long inicio = System.nanoTime();
        long comparaciones = metodo.ordenar(copia);
        long fin = System.nanoTime();
        long memDespues = memoriaUsada();
        long deltaMem = Math.max(0, memDespues - memAntes);
        return new Resultado(nombre, comparaciones, fin - inicio, deltaMem);
    }

    static Resultado medirNumero(String nombre, int[] base, OrdenadorNumero metodo) {
        int[] copia = Arrays.copyOf(base, base.length);
        long memAntes = memoriaUsada();
        long inicio = System.nanoTime();
        long comparaciones = metodo.ordenar(copia);
        long fin = System.nanoTime();
        long memDespues = memoriaUsada();
        long deltaMem = Math.max(0, memDespues - memAntes);
        return new Resultado(nombre, comparaciones, fin - inicio, deltaMem);
    }

    static long burbujaSimpleTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++)
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[j + 1]) > 0) {
                    String t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                }
            }
        return comp;
    }

    static long burbujaMejoradoTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        boolean huboCambio;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            huboCambio = false;
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[j + 1]) > 0) {
                    String t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                    huboCambio = true;
                }
            }
            if (!huboCambio) break;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long quickSortTexto(String[] arr) {
        long[] comp = {0};
        quickSortRecTexto(arr, 0, arr.length - 1, comp);
        return comp[0];
    }

    static void quickSortRecTexto(String[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        if (low < high) {
            int p = particionTexto(arr, low, high, comp);
            quickSortRecTexto(arr, low, p - 1, comp);
            quickSortRecTexto(arr, p + 1, high, comp);
        }
    }

    static int particionTexto(String[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        String pivote = arr[high];
        int i = low - 1;
        for (int j = low; j < high; j++) {
            comp[0]++;
            if (compararTexto(arr[j], pivote) <= 0) {
                i++;
                String t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = t;
            }
        }
        String t = arr[i + 1]; arr[i + 1] = arr[high]; arr[high] = t;
        return i + 1;
    }

    static long shellSortTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int gap = arr.length / 2; gap > 0; gap /= 2)
            for (int i = gap; i < arr.length; i++) {
                String temp = arr[i];
                int j = i;
                while (j >= gap) {
                    comp++;
                    if (compararTexto(arr[j - gap], temp) > 0) {
                        arr[j] = arr[j - gap];
                        j -= gap;
                    } else break;
                }
                arr[j] = temp;
            }
        return comp;
    }

    static long seleccionDirectaTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            int min = i;
            for (int j = i + 1; j < arr.length; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[min]) < 0) min = j;
            }
            String t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[min]; arr[min] = t;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long insercionTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
            String clave = arr[i];
            int j = i - 1;
            while (j >= 0) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], clave) > 0) {
                    arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
                    j--;
                } else break;
            }
            arr[j + 1] = clave;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long burbujaSimpleNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++)
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {
                    int t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                }
            }
        return comp;
    }

    static long burbujaMejoradoNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        boolean huboCambio;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            huboCambio = false;
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {
                    int t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                    huboCambio = true;
                }
            }
            if (!huboCambio) break;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long quickSortNum(int[] arr) {
        long[] comp = {0};
        quickSortRecNum(arr, 0, arr.length - 1, comp);
        return comp[0];
    }

    static void quickSortRecNum(int[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        if (low < high) {
            int p = particionNum(arr, low, high, comp);
            quickSortRecNum(arr, low, p - 1, comp);
            quickSortRecNum(arr, p + 1, high, comp);
        }
    }

    static int particionNum(int[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        int pivote = arr[high];
        int i = low - 1;
        for (int j = low; j < high; j++) {
            comp[0]++;
            if (arr[j] <= pivote) {
                i++;
                int t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = t;
            }
        }
        int t = arr[i + 1]; arr[i + 1] = arr[high]; arr[high] = t;
        return i + 1;
    }

    static long shellSortNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int gap = arr.length / 2; gap > 0; gap /= 2)
            for (int i = gap; i < arr.length; i++) {
                int temp = arr[i];
                int j = i;
                while (j >= gap) {
                    comp++;
                    if (arr[j - gap] > temp) {
                        arr[j] = arr[j - gap];
                        j -= gap;
                    } else break;
                }
                arr[j] = temp;
            }
        return comp;
    }

    static long seleccionDirectaNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            int min = i;
            for (int j = i + 1; j < arr.length; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] < arr[min]) min = j;
            }
            int t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[min]; arr[min] = t;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long insercionNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
            int clave = arr[i];
            int j = i - 1;
            while (j >= 0) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > clave) {
                    arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
                    j--;
                } else break;
            }
            arr[j + 1] = clave;
        }
        return comp;
    }
}

Output del punto
